creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
/usr/local/kde4/bin was always in thepath, but kmailservice used to be 
in /usr/local/kde4/lib/kde4/libexec and it didn't work.
But in the current version of kde4 kmailservice is in 
/usr/local/kde4/bin and there is no need for this patch. Path itself 
works fine.

Thanks.
